title: galinsoga brachiata
intro: Galinsoga brachiata is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Mexican tea or small ragweed. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Galinsoga brachiata include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, among others. It can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or used in combination with other herbs in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
